communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Arizona Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

All documents, PowerPoint files, bulletins, and emails containing the term "Flipper Zero" from January 2023 through the completion of this request. 

Context: We are conducting research on law enforcement messaging and documentation around the public's use of the Flipper Zero device. We are aware that the Homeland Defense Bureau Intelligence Unit employee published U-PHX 01-19-23 on the Flipper Zero. We are seeking documents, files, emails, and research surrounding the creation of this bulletin and any subsequent mentions of the Flipper Zero. 

Deduplication: If the same email was received by multiple Phoenix PD personnel, please de-duplicate the responsive documents as needed to minimize total responsive file size.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Alan J. Segal
